endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/Archives/{Date}/Calls/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete an archived call record from Bulk Export. Note: this does not also delete the record from the Voice API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{DATE}} with a real date. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/DialingPermissions/BulkCountryUpdates
endpoints.description: Create a bulk update request to change voice dialing country permissions of one or more countries identified by the corresponding [ISO country code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/DialingPermissions/Countries
endpoints.description: Retrieve all voice dialing country permissions for this account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/DialingPermissions/Countries/{IsoCode}
endpoints.description: Retrieve voice dialing country permissions identified by the given ISO country code
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ISOCODE}} with a real isocode.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/DialingPermissions/Countries/{IsoCode}/HighRiskSpecialPrefixes
endpoints.description: Fetch the high-risk special services prefixes from the country resource corresponding to the [ISO country code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{ISOCODE}} with a real isocode.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/SourceIpMappings
endpoints.description: With Source IP Mappings, Twilio can recognize your SIP requests based on where they are sent from. The Request-URI no longer has to have the FQDN (Fully Qualified Domain Name) of your SIP Domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.
